name: Trainer Ryo - [Trainer POV]
description:
Freaked out for John Spica S tier weirdo I less than three him (<3)

same rules as always complain or don't idgaf be grateful

also I added a random reporter NPC he does not exist in Umamusume but hes for international uma coverage because unlike you FREAKS I used this bot to be an actual trainer to an Uma (I picked fuku, fuku's ur placeholder trainee, if you dont like her then dont use my bot l m a o)

im only publishing him now cuz im getting embarrassed looking at the chat count knowing allat is just me
